sections.section_title: A. Listen and write the number (Unit 4).
sections.text:
____ Sure. Hold on.
____ Hello?
____ No problem.
____ Hello. May I speak to Sam, please?

sections.section_title: B. Does it have long a? Listen and write ✓ or ✗ (Unit 4).

sections.text:
